cases.prompt: 새로운 한국 부동산 매물 검색 앱 만들고 싶어. 타깃은 2030대, 서울 중심. 어떻게 시작할까?

assertions.text: The agent runs the stage-0 interview covering platform, target users, GitHub repo, budget, external APIs, and deadline.
The agent references the 21-stage pipeline or names at least 5 of: office-hours, research, plan, design, TDD, security, ship, deploy, retro, instincts.
The agent delegates to other skills instead of implementing everything itself.

cases.prompt: Help me scaffold a new MVP for a Stripe-powered subscription SaaS targeting developer tool users. Web first, then iOS.

assertions.text: The agent runs the stage-0 interview.
The agent flags the Stripe integration as a paid API concern to handle in stage 16 (security audit).

cases.prompt: 이 버그 고쳐줘: Login button 누르면 아무것도 안 일어남

assertions.text: The skill does NOT trigger. A bug fix is not a zero-to-one situation; the agent should use simon-tdd or investigate instead.
